what: Water Point Functionality and Service Delivery Monitoring Dataset - 2023
title: Water Point Functionality and Service Delivery Monitoring Dataset - 2023
text: dataset contains water point assessment data collected routine field monitoring activities conducted Malawi 2023 Trocaire water point functionality survey program. survey designed evaluate operational status, service reliability, management conditions rural water supply infrastructure, focus boreholes community-managed water points. Data collection carried using mWater platform. dataset includes geospatial coordinates, functionality status, water availability reliability indicators, pump civil works condition, reported mechanical failures, seasonal variability, water quality observations (including salinity contamination issues), basic performance metrics collection time access distance. dataset also captures governance service delivery information, including water point committee composition, tariff structures, financial record keeping, maintenance practices, service provider arrangements. survey conducted across multiple rural water points Malawi, locations determined program implementation field accessibility. dataset can used : Rural water infrastructure functionality analysis Borehole handpump performance monitoring WASH program evaluation reporting Geospatial mapping service delivery gaps Water quality risk screening (e.g., salinity contamination indicators) Governance sustainability assessments community-managed water systems

title: Water Point Functionality and Service Delivery Monitoring Dataset - 2023

title: Water Point Functionality and Service Delivery Monitoring Dataset - 2023

title: Water Point Functionality and Service Delivery Monitoring Dataset - 2023
text: dataset waterpointstatus contains 1425 observations 45 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Water Point Functionality and Service Delivery Monitoring Dataset - 2023
code:
library(waterpointstatus) # Example 1: Visualization Map on water point status library(leaflet) library(dplyr) library(stringr) # ----------------------------- # 1. Data preparation # ----------------------------- wp_map <- waterpointstatus %>% mutate( latitude = as.numeric(latitude), longitude = as.numeric(longitude), # Clean functional status (real-world messy labels handled) functional_status = case_when( str_detect(tolower(functional_status), "functional") & !str_detect(tolower(functional_status), "not|non") ~ "Functional", str_detect(tolower(functional_status), "not|non") ~ "Non-functional", TRUE ~ "Unknown / Partial" ), # Population user_population = as.numeric(user_population), # Scale for visualization pop_scaled = sqrt(user_population) ) %>% filter(!is.na(latitude), !is.na(longitude)) # ----------------------------- # 2. Color palette # ----------------------------- status_palette <- colorFactor( palette = c( "Functional" = "green", "Non-functional" = "red", "Unknown / Partial" = "orange" ), domain = wp_map$functional_status ) # ----------------------------- # 3. Leaflet map # ----------------------------- leaflet(wp_map) %>% addProviderTiles(providers$OpenStreetMap) %>% addCircleMarkers( lng = ~longitude, lat = ~latitude, color = ~status_palette(functional_status), fillColor = ~status_palette(functional_status), fillOpacity = 0.75, stroke = TRUE, weight = 1, radius = ~ifelse(is.na(pop_scaled), 4, pop_scaled / 6), popup = ~paste0( "Water Point ID: ", waterpoint_id, "
", "Status: ", functional_status, "
", "User population: ", ifelse(is.na(user_population), "NA", user_population), "
", "Fill time (20L): ", ifelse(is.na(fill_time_20l), "NA", fill_time_20l), "
", "Repair days: ", ifelse(is.na(repair_duration_days), "NA", repair_duration_days), "
", "Latrine within 100m: ", latrine_within_100m ) ) %>% addLegend( position = "bottomright", pal = status_palette, values = ~functional_status, title = "Water Point Status" )

what: Water Point Functionality and Service Delivery Monitoring Dataset - 2023 — waterpointstatus
title: Water Point Functionality and Service Delivery Monitoring Dataset - 2023 — waterpointstatus
text: dataset contains structured field survey responses collected water point inspections interviews community members water point committee representatives. record represents single survey event linked specific water point, including GPS coordinates, enumerator metadata, timestamps, detailed observations infrastructure condition, functionality, water availability, maintenance practices, governance arrangements.

title: Water Point Functionality and Service Delivery Monitoring Dataset - 2023 — waterpointstatus
Water Point Functionality and Service Delivery Monitoring Dataset - 2023 — waterpointstatus
text: tibble 1425 rows 45 variables waterpoint_id Unique identifier assigned water point. latitude Geographic latitude water point longitude Geographic longitude water point waterpoint_image File name reference image captured survey visit. functional_status Operational status water point time visit downtime_duration Reported length time water point non-functional abandoned. abandon_reason Primary reason water point abandoned left non-functional. has_current_issue Indicates whether current technical operational problem observed. current_issue Type current problem affecting water point. water_available_today Indicates whether water available day visit. continuous_30days Indicates whether water point provided uninterrupted water supply past 30 days. no_water_30days_reason Reason water interruptions within last 30 days. repair_duration_days Number days taken repair water point recent breakdown seasonal_unavailable Indicates whether water source becomes unavailable certain seasons. seasonal_period Time year water typically unavailable due seasonal variation. flow_test_possible Indicates whether flow rate test conducted visit. fill_time_20l Time required fill 20-litre container flow rate test. latrine_within_100m Indicates presence latrine within 100 metres water point. observed_issues General technical structural problems observed visit, multiple responses possible water_quality_issues Observed reported water quality concerns preventive_maintenance Indicates whether routine preventative maintenance performed water point. maintenance_barrier Main reason preventing regular preventative maintenance. user_population Estimated number people regularly using water point. universal_access Indicates whether community members access water point. households_no_access Estimated number households without access water point. access_barrier Primary reason households lack access water point. max_roundtrip_minutes Maximum reported round-trip time minutes collect water. max_distance_metres Maximum reported one-way walking distance water point. has_service_provider Indicates whether designated service provider operator responsible water point. provider_type Type service provider responsible operation maintenance has_tariff Indicates whether users pay tariff fee water access. tariff_frequency Frequency water tariff user fee collected. tariff_amount_mwk Amount charged per tariff period Malawi Kwacha tariff_cost_basis Cost factors considered setting water tariff has_financial_records Indicates whether financial records books maintained water point. has_positive_balance Indicates whether financial records show positive account balance. savings_or_loans Indicates evidence savings accumulation loan repayment financial records. record_balance_mwk Reported balance recorded financial books has_bank_account Indicates whether service provider maintains formal bank account. bank_balance_mwk Reported balance held bank account committee_year_formed Year water point committee established. committee_member_count Total number members serving water point committee. committee_women_count Number women serving water point committee. treasurer_gender Gender committee treasurer. months_unavailable Total number months per year water source unavailable.
